mapper.sql: id, external_id, source, url, redirect_url, title, description, activity_address, departing_from, destinations, destination_coordinates, search_lat, search_lng, destinations_norm, navigation_list, itinerary_stops, pickup_addresses, price_amount, price_currency, duration_raw, duration_hours, visit_duration_minutes, rating, review_count, booked_count, thumbnail, images, highlights, what_to_expect, itinerary, created_at, updated_at

id, external_id, source, url, redirect_url, title, description, activity_address, departing_from, destinations, destination_coordinates, search_lat, search_lng, destinations_norm, navigation_list, itinerary_stops, pickup_addresses, price_amount, price_currency, duration_raw, duration_hours, visit_duration_minutes, rating, review_count, booked_count, thumbnail, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity_bookings ( id, external_id, source, url, redirect_url, title, description, activity_address, departing_from, destinations, destination_coordinates, search_lat, search_lng, destinations_norm, navigation_list, itinerary_stops, pickup_addresses, price_amount, price_currency, duration_raw, duration_hours, visit_duration_minutes, rating, review_count, booked_count, thumbnail, images, highlights, what_to_expect, itinerary, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{externalId}, #{source}, #{url}, #{redirectUrl}, #{title}, #{description}, #{activityAddress}, #{departingFrom}, #{destinations}::jsonb, #{destinationCoordinates}::jsonb, #{searchLat}, #{searchLng}, #{destinationsNorm}, #{navigationList}::jsonb, #{itineraryStops}::jsonb, #{pickupAddresses}::jsonb, #{priceAmount}, #{priceCurrency}, #{durationRaw}, #{durationHours}, #{visitDurationMinutes}, #{rating}, #{reviewCount}, #{bookedCount}, #{thumbnail}, #{images}::jsonb, #{highlights}::jsonb, #{whatToExpect}::jsonb, #{itinerary}::jsonb, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE activity_bookings SET url = #{url}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, redirect_url = #{redirectUrl}, activity_address = #{activityAddress}, departing_from = #{departingFrom}, destinations = #{destinations}::jsonb, destination_coordinates = #{destinationCoordinates}::jsonb, search_lat = #{searchLat}, search_lng = #{searchLng}, destinations_norm = #{destinationsNorm}, navigation_list = #{navigationList}::jsonb, itinerary_stops = #{itineraryStops}::jsonb, pickup_addresses = #{pickupAddresses}::jsonb, price_amount = #{priceAmount}, price_currency = #{priceCurrency}, duration_raw = #{durationRaw}, duration_hours = #{durationHours}, visit_duration_minutes = #{visitDurationMinutes}, rating = #{rating}, review_count = #{reviewCount}, booked_count = #{bookedCount}, thumbnail = #{thumbnail}, images = #{images}::jsonb, highlights = #{highlights}::jsonb, what_to_expect = #{whatToExpect}::jsonb, itinerary = #{itinerary}::jsonb, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM activity_bookings WHERE id IN
#{id}
SELECT FROM activity_bookings ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
